title: Start
body:
Ah mi butch :D hello?! now how did a boy of your age make it uut to a place like this and where are your parents.
[[Answer:i cant recall how i got here but i am ever so hungry sir.|1op1]]
[[Answer:oi i dont well know what a parent is but i do well got a hankering for a bit a grub if you dont well min sparin ome govner.|1op2]]

title: 1op1
body:
well buddy if your really that hungry then why don't you come in and join us oh I'm sorry me for dinner
[[Answer:id love to|warrning]]
[[Answer:it would be my pleasure|warrning]]

title: 1op2
body:
im sorry but i cant seem to understand what you seem to be saying but you do apper to be hungry would you like to join us for diner
[[Answer:eul i ud go fer a cuper and a bit a grub ankits fer the oitality mate|warrning]] 
[[Answer:im sorry i dont actualy talk like that i dont know what came over me|2op1]]

title: 2op1
body:
well do ya want to joins us i mean me for supper
[[Answer:id love to|warrning]]
[[Answer:it would be my pleasure|warrning]]

title: warrning
body:
well before you go have some food for the rode oh and remeber not to verr  off the path
